name: Stuffed Peppers/Jambalaya
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the smoked sausage, diced onions, bell peppers, celery, bay leaves, minced garlic, file powder, green onions, parsley, tomatoes, tomato sauce, crushed tomatoes, crab meat, and crawfish tails to the skillet.
3. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Stir in the cooked rice and season with salt, pepper, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Spoon the mixture into the halved bell peppers, filling each one completely.
6. Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the top of each stuffed pepper.
7. Drizzle a little oil on top of the breadcrumbs.
8. Transfer the skillet to an oven preheated to 400°F (200°C) and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the peppers are tender and the filling is hot throughout.
